feed.title: Howl Street — Global Financial Wire
feed.subtitle: Loudest Howls and the Pack — auto-curated from 100+ global sources.

entry.title: [LOUDEST HOWL] Oil prices rise despite Iran’s proposal to reopen Strait of Hormuz #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: Brent crude rises more than 1 percent despite Iran's offer to reopen waterway in exchange for deferral of nuclear talks.

entry.title: PAL profit up 2.6% in turbulent first quarter #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Philippine Airlines (PAL) weathered a turbulent first quarter to log a 2.6-percent increase in net income, which reached to $78.55 million. This as passenger traffic continued to grow despite airspace disruptions and rising fuel costs linked to the war in the Middle East. READ: PAL seeks wider Alaska Airlines tie-up In a

entry.title: Atlas Mining turns around with P645-M profit in Q1 #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Atlas Consolidated and Mining and Development Corp. reported a net income of P645 million in the first quarter of 2025. This reversed a net loss of P404 million a year ago, driven by higher metal prices. In a disclosure on Tuesday, Atlas Mining said revenues rose by 11 percent to P4.51 billion.

entry.title: Peso touches new low of 60.97:$1 in AM trade; 61.08:$1 in PM session #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: UPDATED FOR AFTERNOON TRADING MANILA, Philippines — The Philippines’s peso slid to a record low on Tuesday, breaching the 61-per-dollar level for the first time in intraday trading READ: Peso depreciates to 60.48:$1 on Middle East war jitters In the afternoon session, the local currency touched an intraday low of 61.08, marking a fresh all-time

entry.title: Apollo Global Capital expands mining business #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Holding firm Apollo Global Capital Inc. has inked a deal with Masbate 2145 Philippines Inc. to significantly expand its presence in the local mining industry. The listed firm signed the operating agreement with Masbate 2145 through its offshore mining subsidiary, JDVC Resources Corp. The agreement covers a 15,909.33-hectare mineral property situated in

entry.title: Hotel101 Madrid racks up P387M bookings in strong debut #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Hotel101-Madrid has generated over 45,000 room night bookings worth 5.44 million euros (about P387 million), signaling strong demand since opening in March. In a disclosure on Tuesday, the company founded by tycoons Tony Tan Caktiong and Edgar “Injap” Sia II said the 680-hotel room is now producing recurring revenues. This marks a

entry.title: RCBC Q1 net income up 12% to P2.7B #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Rizal Commercial Banking Corp. (RCBC) reported a 12-percent increase in first-quarter 2026 profit. This was attributed to core business expansion and lower funding costs. The Yuchengco-led bank said on Tuesday that its net income reached P2.7 billion. READ: RCBC profit rises 11% to P10.6B in 2025 Net interest income rose 25 percent

entry.title: Thailand Sees Weaker Growth, Higher Inflation on Mideast Crisis #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: Thailand expects the Middle East conflict to weaken economic growth and fuel inflation, underscoring the need for more fiscal support to shield consumers and businesses from a worsening energy crisis.

entry.title: Barkly gets green light for 10,000m NT rare earths drilling blitz #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: Barkly Rare Earths has secured its environmental mining licence, paving the way for a 10,000m drilling blitz to grow its 40-million-tonne resource in the Northern Territory.

entry.title: IndiGo flight lands in Guangzhou as airline resumes direct India-China services #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: Move comes amid warming bilateral ties with Air China and China Eastern also restarting services

entry.title: Germany's military shuns Palantir for now, cyber chief tells Handelsblatt #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: Germany's military shuns Palantir for now, cyber chief tells Handelsblatt

entry.title: Albion and Tecnotree Partner to Deliver Next-Generation VAS Platform for TELUS in North America #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: PLAINVIEW, N.Y. — Albion, a leading provider of telecom managed services and solutions, today announced that TELUS has selected Albion, in partnership with Tecnotree, to deliver a next-generation Value-Added Services (VAS) platform, with an initial deployment of a voicemail application. Albion and Tecnotree Partner to Deliver Next-Generation VAS Platform for TELUS in North America Under […]

entry.title: Roquette Showcases Its Expanded Consumer Healthcare Capabilities at Vitafoods Europe 2026 #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: Experts will share insights on consumer ready innovations for everyday health at booth 3F112 LILLE, France — Roquette, a global leader in plant-based ingredients, excipients and pharmaceutical solutions, will present its expanded portfolio at Vitafoods Europe 2026 which is taking place from May 5 to May 7 in Barcelona. Roquette’s offering is designed to help […]

entry.title: Asia LNG imports in March 2026 lowest since 2019 #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: Decline was driven by reduced LNG supply from Qatar and UAE amid the Middle East conflict

entry.title: India turns net exporter of finished steel in FY26 #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: Italy, Vietnam, Belgium, the UAE, and Spain were ‌the biggest buyers of Indian ​finished steel

entry.title: Proteomics diagnostic tests shift from lab coats to commercial launch #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: Proteomics International is rolling out a commercial roadmap with a four-test diagnostics suite targeting kidney disease, cancer and endometriosis across Australia and the US.

entry.title: Ueda Speech: BoJ Governor discusses policy outlook after the expected interest rate hold #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: Bank of Japan (BoJ) Governor Kazuo Ueda is addressing the press conference, explaining the reason behind leaving the key interest rate unchanged at 0.75% in the April policy meeting.

entry.title: Samsung SDI Posts Smaller-Than-Expected Loss; Sending Gain #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: South Korean battery maker Samsung SDI Co. reported a smaller-than-expected first-quarter loss, helping its shares extend a blistering rally, as demand for energy storage systems and electric cars in Europe helped cushion the impact of dwindling EV support in the US.

entry.title: First LNG Shipment Since War Began Appears to Exit Hormuz #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: The first liquefied natural gas shipment since the war in the Middle East began two months ago appears to have traversed the Strait of Hormuz to exit the Persian Gulf.

entry.title: Precore Gold Welcomes Tenured Geologist Raúl Carbajal as Senior Project Manager at Its Arikepay Project in Peru #HowlStreet #GlobalMarkets
entry.summary: VANCOUVER, British Columbia, April 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) — Precore Gold Corp. (CSE: PRCG) (the “Company” or “Precore Gold”) is pleased to welcome Raúl Carbajal as Senior Project Manager of the Company’s highly prospective brownfield copper-gold flagship, the Arikepay Project, in Southern Peru. Paul A. Dumas, Precore Gold Executive Chairman states, “We are happy to […]
